title: Audit V3.2/DSA and roadmap V4 (Flash) support
pr_note: Per dev-team.json push_policy.create_pr=false, NO PR was opened against ggml-org/llama.cpp upstream. Branch was pushed to remote `mine` only: https://github.com/cchuter/llama.cpp/tree/feat/v4-roadmap

history.note: Wrote docs/plans/v4-roadmap.md covering all 5 sections (V3.2 inventory, Metal gap analysis, V4 delta, phased task breakdown, risks).

REVISE round 1 — 7 issues: ggml.c missing as own row; CUDA fattn files collapsed; models.h mis-described; hparam name wrong; §2 metal flash-attn citation wrong; §4 dep encoding; v4-p1-metal-fill-f16 should be verify-only; quant task underestimated; v4-p2-conversion-script smoke-test references GGUF; v4-p5-reference-logits HF FP16 CPU not feasible at 284B.

Round 1 fixes applied: split ggml.c row; per-file CUDA fattn rows; models.h corrected; hparam name fixed; §2 rewritten against real Metal FA paths; explicit task ID dependencies; verify-only fill task; quant bumped to M; HF safetensors note; two-tier reference-logits strategy; antirez refs labeled external.

REVISE round 2 — 4 issues: §2c/Phase 1 false claim that non-vec top-k is optional (V3.2 always attaches top_k); ggml.c line numbers off (1083→1066, 1192→1177); path-only rows missing line numbers; v4-p1-test-v32-end-to-end harness not concrete.

Round 2 fixes: corrected ggml.c line numbers; both vec and non-vec FA top-k now in scope; concrete line numbers added to deepseek32.cpp and llama-graph.cpp rows; v4-p1-test-v32-end-to-end split into Part A (synthetic, always-on) and Part B (model-conditioned, env-var-gated).

REVISE round 3 — 3 issues: kv-cache.cpp/.h merged into one row; §3a overclaims source certainty (mHC tensor names from antirez fork, not HF card); v4-p4-chat-template Phase-3 dep wrong; v4-p5-logit-diff-test should depend on full V4 forward.

Round 3 fixes: split kv-cache.cpp/.h rows with line numbers; §3a tightened to only HF-card-confirmed claims; mHC names moved to §3b hypothesis; chat-template dep on conversion-script not Phase 3; logit-diff-test deps on hca-attention + test-backend-ops.

REVISE round 4 — 3 issues: build_graph→build_arch_graph; chat-template symbol convention LLM_CHAT_TEMPLATE_DEEPSEEK_3 not LLAMA_CHAT_TEMPLATE_DEEPSEEK_V3; v4-p5-reference-logits internal inconsistency about p3-test-backend-ops dep.
Round 4 fixes: build_arch_graph everywhere; LLM_CHAT_TEMPLATE_DEEPSEEK_4 with correct convention; v4-p5-reference-logits dep cleaned to p4-chat-template only.

REVISE round 5 — 3 issues: Phase 3 missing tasks for output-routing keys (output_lora_rank, output_group_count, hash.layer_count); no mixed-precision quant pipeline task; builder hand-off too implicit.

Round 5 fixes: added v4-p3-output-routing and v4-p3-quant-pipeline tasks; explicit builder hand-off contract block at top of §4 specifying per-row .claude/agents/<id>.md + tasks/active/<id>.json schema.

AUTO-APPROVED per orchestrator skill rule (review_rounds reached 2 on REVISE). Codex returned multiple REVISE verdicts on minor issues; final 5 rounds of revisions applied substantive fixes (line numbers, real Metal paths, correct symbol names, builder hand-off contract). Total 26 phased tasks across 5 phases. Proceeding to builder phase.

Generated 26 .claude/agents/v4-p*.md specs and 26 tasks/active/v4-p*.json trackers from the roadmap §1d phased table. Created feat/v4-roadmap branch and committed all scaffolding (60bfafbfe). No source code changes — planning artifacts only.
APPROVE — all 26 tasks have both spec.md and tracker.json; JSONs are valid and share the schema; ids/branches/spec_paths self-consistent; dev-team.json push_policy documented; no source-code changes.

Build passed: `cmake --build build -j` exit 0 (all targets built incl. llama-cli, llama-server, test-llama-archs). Pushed feat/v4-roadmap to remote `mine` (cchuter/llama.cpp). PR intentionally NOT created per dev-team.json push_policy.
